text: Harness installed on cloud branch; commit harness/memory/memory.jsonl before session end or lessons are lost.

Removed 2 uncited hardware refs (Loihi/SpiNNaker) for IEEE compliance and scope; signposted existing Limitations paragraph; trimmed keywords 8->6. Citation integrity clean (23/23). papercheck submission: 2 errors -> 1 (only abstract length 274>200 remains).
